description: Composition Navy blue and red printed kurta made of lightweight 100% cotton, has a small collar with slit at front, sequin and bead embellishments on placket around slit, cap sleeves with embellished cuffs, long vents at sides and embellished panel at hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water Do not bleach Dry in shade Medium to hot iron This kurta is made of soft lightweight cotton which – along with the cap sleeves, will keep you cool in warm weather. The embellishment on the front, cuffs and hem lift this kurta from plain to party – wear it over leggings or over jeans and add simple or heavy jewellery depending on the occasion. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
